creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jason,

I'm trying to find out what the state of this PR [1] is. After being
closed, it has been re-opened on your request, but there hasn't been any
update on it since then. Please let us know if you are still working on
the matlab port, or if the PR should be closed.

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/110144
